title: Ability to Create Folders Within the Files Section of a Record
excerpt: The files section of some of our records are becoming hard to navigate because there are so many files. The ability to create folders would be great so we can have a more organized view of files. Thank you!

posts.author: Dmcgillic1 (Danielle Lawrence)
posts.cookedHtml: The files section of some of our records are becoming hard to navigate because there are so many files. The ability to create folders would be great so we can have a more organized view of files. Thank you!

posts.author: anowacka (Anna from SolDevelo)
posts.cookedHtml: @Dmcgillic1 although we currently don’t offer folders in Item view, you might be interested in using our Advanced File Gallery app. It allows you to create folders in File Gallery on the board level.

posts.author: Mason-Lee (Mason-Lee)
posts.cookedHtml:
Danielle Lawrence:

The files section of some of our records are becoming hard to navigate because there are so many files. The ability to create folders would be great so we can have a more organized view of files. Thank you!

Totally agree, having folders would make things so much easier to find! It’s getting a bit messy with all the files in one place. Hope they add this feature soon!
